labs.title: Network interface configuration
labs.description: Display all network interfaces, their IP addresses, MAC addresses, and link state on the local machine.
instructions: Open a terminal on your Linux machine
Run: ip a
Observe the output and note what information is displayed
Run: ip addr show
Observe the output and note what information is displayed
Compare the results with what was discussed in the lecture
Take notes on any differences or new observations

labs.title: Package management
labs.description: Install, update, and remove software packages on Debian/Ubuntu systems.
instructions: Open a terminal on your Linux machine
Run: apt update
Observe the output and note what information is displayed
Run: apt install package
Observe the output and note what information is displayed
Compare the results with what was discussed in the lecture
Take notes on any differences or new observations

labs.title: Debian package manager
labs.description: Low-level tool for installing and inspecting .deb packages directly.
instructions: Open a terminal on your Linux machine
Run: dpkg -l
Observe the output and note what information is displayed
Run: dpkg -i package.deb
Observe the output and note what information is displayed
Compare the results with what was discussed in the lecture
Take notes on any differences or new observations

labs.title: Packet tracer Exploration
labs.description: Explore Packet tracer hands-on and understand what it can do in a networking context.
instructions: Open a terminal on your Linux machine
Research the concept: Hands-on practice with Packet tracer
Try to find related commands and tools
Document your findings
